task_description: Wire remaining QuantTube pages (channel, upload) to real API calls and clean up @simulated annotations from all 12 agent-runtime pilot files. Most of the ecosystem is already properly wired (QuantMail, QuantDrive, QuantDocs, QuantMeet, QuantChat all use hooks/apiClient). The remaining gaps are QuantTube channel page (hardcoded mock data), QuantTube upload page (fake timer-based upload), and misleading @simulated comments on pilots that already use the AI engine.

verification.summary: pnpm turbo typecheck passes for both @quant/quantube (12/12 tasks cached) and @quant/agent-runtime (4/4 tasks cached). No @simulated annotations remain. No MOCK_ constants used as primary data source. No simulateUpload logic remaining.
